_comment: This is an EXAMPLE schema with placeholder values. The real taste_profile.json is generated by running the taste analyzer (POST /api/taste/analyze or the 'Analyze my taste' banner on first launch). The real file is gitignored — it is personal. The schema is what the rest of the app reads.

world_one_key.name: Human-readable name for this cultural world
world_one_key.description: What this world means to you. Not a genre — a scene, a context, a part of your daily life that this music soundtracks.

world_two_key.name: Another world
world_two_key.description: Another scene. Different mood, different moment, different identity.

current_direction.signal: What's shifting and why — maturing, narrowing, opening up, regressing.

negative_space.principle: What the absence reveals about how you relate to music.

taste_algorithm: Rule 1 — how you actually pick music, grounded in your data.
Rule 3 — where discovery comes from (algorithms, travel, family, internet).
Rule 5 — the trade-off between sophistication and accessibility.
identity_marker_songs: Artist — Song (why this song is sentimentally important to you)
